name: Ariel Berjit
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
base_skills: Frontend Engineering: React (Hooks, Context, Performance Optimization), TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Vue.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Responsive UI Architecture, State Management & Async Data Handling
Backend Engineering: Node.js, NestJS, Python (Django), Java (Spring Boot), RESTful API Architecture, Microservices Architecture, Event-Driven Systems, Background Workers & Async Processing
Databases & Data Systems: PostgreSQL (Advanced), Relational Schema Design, Query Optimization & Indexing, Transaction Management, Redis Caching
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, ECS, RDS, S3, Lambda), Docker, CI/CD Pipelines (GitHub Actions), Cloud Infrastructure Automation, Monitoring & Logging
AI & Emerging Technologies: LLM API Integrations, AI-assisted workflows, AI automation pipelines, Prompt engineering for product features
Engineering Practices: System Architecture & Design, Code Reviews & Engineering Standards, Automated Testing, Agile/Scrum Development, Production Debugging & Incident Response
Architecture Leadership: Technical roadmaps, architectural reviews, engineering mentorship

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
base_bullets: Architected and implemented end-to-end full-stack platforms using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js (NestJS), and PostgreSQL supporting complex analytics dashboards and product automation tools.
Developed high-performance React and TypeScript interfaces with reusable component architecture and performance optimizations for data-intensive applications.
Built scalable backend services using Node.js and NestJS, designing modular microservice architectures and well-structured API contracts.
Implemented Vue.js UI modules for dynamic visualization features and interactive dashboard components.
Designed and maintained RESTful APIs and service integrations supporting internal systems and third-party platforms.
Integrated LLM-based AI features for automated data classification, intelligent search, and workflow automation using external AI APIs.
Designed optimized PostgreSQL schemas and indexing strategies, improving database performance by 40% under high-concurrency workloads.
Implemented Redis caching layers and background worker systems for asynchronous job processing and event-driven workflows.
Containerized applications using Docker and deployed microservices to AWS ECS with automated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions.
Collaborated closely with product managers and designers to translate complex requirements into scalable technical solutions.
Led architecture discussions, code reviews, and engineering best practices, improving maintainability and system scalability.
Improved production reliability through enhanced monitoring, logging, and observability strategies.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
base_bullets: Built full-stack platforms using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL to support financial analytics and reporting systems.
Developed React-based dashboards and visualization interfaces enabling real-time financial data analysis.
Designed scalable Node.js backend services and REST APIs handling high-volume ingestion from external financial data providers.
Implemented backend services using Python (Django) for data processing pipelines and internal automation tools.
Designed relational data models supporting millions of records, implementing indexing and query optimization strategies.
Developed asynchronous data ingestion pipelines and background job processing systems.
Improved API response latency by 35% through database optimization, caching strategies, and query refactoring.
Containerized applications using Docker and deployed to AWS infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines.
Worked closely with product and data teams to deliver scalable analytics capabilities.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
base_bullets: Built responsive web applications using JavaScript, React, and modern frontend frameworks.
Implemented backend services using Java (Spring Boot) and RESTful APIs supporting enterprise applications and reporting systems.
Developed backend services using Node.js for lightweight API services and integrations.
Designed relational database schemas and optimized SQL queries for transactional and reporting workloads.
Built reusable UI components and responsive layouts improving application usability and maintainability.
Integrated internal platforms with external enterprise systems through API-based integrations.
Assisted in migrating legacy systems to cloud-based infrastructure environments.
Contributed to CI/CD automation and deployment pipelines, improving release reliability and development efficiency.
Supported debugging and performance optimization across distributed application environments.
